parsed.production_notes: The top character is an AI-generated avatar, evidenced by the unnatural glowing lines on her face, overly smooth skin, and slightly stiff lip-sync. The bottom character is a human actor in a real, physically lit environment.

characters.appearance: Young female, smooth complexion, brown hair. Distinctive glowing blue lines trace her facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Shiny orange/copper hoodie and large over-ear headphones.

characters.appearance: Young, medium complexion, curly dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Covered with a patterned blanket featuring red, grey, and white stripes.

scenes.setting: Top: futuristic, warmly lit room. Bottom: dimly lit bedroom.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young female AI avatar, Character A, is framed in a close-up shot. She wears a shiny, metallic-looking orange or copper hoodie. Large, dark over-ear headphones rest on her head. Her face features distinctive, glowing blue lines that trace her cheeks and jawline. The background is softly blurred, showing warm, ambient lighting with purple and blue hues, suggesting a cozy, modern indoor setting. She maintains a friendly, engaging expression throughout the shot.

A young woman, Character B, is lying in bed, framed in a medium close-up. She has curly dark hair and a medium complexion. She is covered up to her chest with a thick, patterned blanket featuring stripes of red, grey, and white. Her head rests on a white pillow. Behind her, a wooden slatted headboard is visible. The lighting is warm and dim, typical of a bedroom at night or early morning. She looks slightly sleepy but attentive.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a horizontal split-screen. The top half features an AI avatar in a futuristic setting, while the bottom half shows a human woman in a realistic bedroom. The camera remains static on both characters throughout the scene. Various text overlays and graphics pop up in the center or over the characters, including a clock, a calendar, a price tag, and a large number graphic. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯ? [What are you doing?]

Character B says: I... sleeping.

Character A says: 'I am sleeping' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'I am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳ್ಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'. You can also say it a bit more formally as 'I am getting some sleep'.]

Character B says: ಓ ಹೌದಾ. English ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲೀಬೇಕು? [Oh, is it. How to learn English?]

Character A says: ನನ್ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 ತಿಂಗಳಿನಲ್ಲಿ English ಕಲೀಬಹುದು. [If you practice daily for 15 minutes with me, you can learn English in 1 month.]

Character B says: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? ನನ್ನ ಹತ್ರ ಅಷ್ಟು ದುಡ್ಡಿಲ್ಲ. [Will this cost a lot? I don't have that much money.]

Character A says: ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡ್ಬಹುದು. 50 ಲಕ್ಷಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ English ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 rupee. More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me.]

Character B says: ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?]

Character A says: ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app download ಮಾಡಿ, [Download the MySivi app right now,]

panels.panel_visual_description: A screen recording of a mobile phone interface is shown. The screen displays a digital storefront or app download page. At the top, an app icon is visible next to the app's name. Below this, a progress indicator shows a download is pending. Buttons for canceling or opening the app are displayed. Further down, sections for "What's new" and "Rate this app" are visible, featuring standard UI elements like text descriptions and star rating icons. The background is a standard dark mode interface.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to a full-screen view of a mobile phone interface. It shows the Google Play Store page for the MySivi app. The app is in the process of downloading, indicated by the "Pending..." text. The screen remains static, showing the download progress. Subtitles continue to appear at the bottom of the screen, overlapping the app interface.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D render of a modern smartphone is the central focus. The phone initially appears from the back, showcasing its camera module, then spins around to reveal the front screen. The screen displays a clean, white interface. In the center, a purple logo and app name are prominently featured. Below the logo, a descriptive tagline is visible. At the bottom of the screen, a purple, pill-shaped button invites user interaction. The background is a solid, light purple color.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features a 3D animation of a smartphone spinning into view against a plain, light purple background. The phone's screen displays the MySivi app logo, the text "English speaking app", and a purple "Install Now" button. The animation is smooth and highlights the phone's design before settling on the screen interface. There are no other overlays or subtitles in this scene. The shot serves as a clear call to action for the viewer.
